demo.title: suwappu-quote.sh
demo.code:
# Get a free agent key
curl -X POST https://api.suwappu.bot/v1/agent/register \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"my-agent"}'
export SUWAPPU_API_KEY=suwappu_sk_...

# Add Suwappu to your agent (read-only by default — execute_swap excluded)
openclaw mcp add suwappu --url https://api.suwappu.bot/mcp \
  --transport streamable-http \
  --header "Authorization=Bearer $SUWAPPU_API_KEY" --exclude execute_swap

# Now: "quote 0.1 ETH to USDC on Base" -> ~172 USDC via OKX (price impact 0.96%)
# 14 chains, 10+ providers, best-route automatically.

setup: Get a free API key: `curl -X POST https://api.suwappu.bot/v1/agent/register -d '{"name":"my-agent"}'`
Add the MCP server: `openclaw mcp add suwappu --url https://api.suwappu.bot/mcp --transport streamable-http --header "Authorization=Bearer $SUWAPPU_API_KEY" --exclude execute_swap`
Read-only by default; enable `execute_swap` only on an isolated trading agent. x402 pay-per-call supported.
